user_query: I'm thinking of starting a Minecraft YouTube channel and I want to showcase different servers and games. Can you suggest some popular Minecraft servers and provide me with information on the cheapest game deals available?

TaskList.description: Research and list popular Minecraft servers that are currently trending.
Gather details about the gameplay and features of each popular Minecraft server found in Step 1.
Check the latest discounts and deals on Minecraft game versions or related products.
Compile the information from Steps 2 and 3 into a structured report for your YouTube channel.
